nameEn: Sabil of Muhammad Ali at al-Aqqadin
whyCandidateMatters: Sabil of Muhammad Ali at al-Aqqadin would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Muhammad Ali period layer in Historic Cairo through a sabil rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
